languages.text: "Вот уж есть тут такие взрывчатые цветы. Их пыльца, если над ней прочитать литанию ярости, а затем смешать с кое-чем, то она служит заменой этому... как его... фузелину! Пули точим из коры, костей погибших или из остовов тех огромных тварей. С гильзами посложнее, но иногда получается проточить дерево — тут зависит от того, правильно литанию истового труда прочитал или запнулся. Если сбился, патроны часто дают осечку, а то и вовсе взрываются в стволе".

"There are these explosive flowers around here. Their pollen works as a substitute for... How do you call it... fyceline! You've got to recite a litany of fury over it and then mix it with some other things. We carve bullets out of bark and bones, either from our own dead or some huge creatures. It's trickier with shell casings, but sometimes you bore a hole through wood nice and clean — it depends on whether you recited the litany of fervent labour correctly or not. If you get it wrong, then the bullets tend to misfire, or even explode in the barrel."

Пули точим из коры, костей погибших или из остовов тех огромных тварей. С гильзами посложнее, но иногда получается проточить дерево — тут зависит от того, правильно литанию истового труда прочитал или запнулся. Если сбился, патроны часто дают осечку, а то и вовсе взрываются в стволе".

traits.locale_text: "There are these explosive flowers around here. Their pollen works as a substitute for... How do you call it... fyceline! You've got to recite a litany of fury over it and then mix it with something else. We carve bullets out of bark and bones, either of our dead or some huge creatures. It's more difficult with shell casings, but sometimes it's possible to sharpen wood — it depends on whether you recited the litany of fervent labour correctly or stumbled. If you get it wrong, then the bullets tend to misfire, or even explode in the barrel."

"There are these explosive flowers around here. Their pollen works as a substitute for... How do you call it... fyceline! It's trickier with shell casings, but sometimes it's possible to sharpen wood — it depends on whether you recited the litany of fervent labour correctly or not. If you get it wrong, then the bullets tend to misfire, or even explode in the barrel."

"There are these explosive flowers around here. Their pollen works as a substitute for fyceline — you've got to recite a litany of the God-Emperor's fury over it and then mix it with something else. We use consecreated tools to carve bullets out of super-strong bark and bones, either of our dead or some huge creatures. It's more difficult with shell casings, but sometimes it's possible to sharpen wood — it depends on whether you say the right prayer of toil. If you get it wrong, then the bullets tend to misfire, or even explode in the barrel."

languages.text: 「この辺には爆発する花がある。その花粉はフィセルインの代用品になる。神皇帝の怒りの呪文を唱えてから、他のものと混ぜる。聖なる道具を使って、超硬い樹皮や骨から弾丸を削る。死者のものや巨大な生き物のものを使う。弾殻は難しいが、木を研ぐこともできる。正しい労働の祈りを唱えれば。間違えると、弾丸は発射不良を起こしたり、銃身で爆発したりする」
languages.original_text: "There are these explosive flowers around here. Their pollen works as a substitute for fyceline — you've got to recite a litany of the God-Emperor's fury over it and then mix it with something else. We use consecreated tools to carve bullets out of super-strong bark and bones, either of our dead or some huge creatures. It's more difficult with shell casings, but sometimes it's possible to sharpen wood — it depends on whether you say the right prayer of toil. If you get it wrong, then the bullets tend to misfire, or even explode in the barrel."

languages.text: "Burada şu patlayıcı çiçekler var. Polenleri... Nasıl deniyordu, fiselin yerine geçiyor! Gazap ilahisi okuyup diğer şeylerle karıştırmanız gerekiyor. Mermileri, ya kendi ölülerimizden ya da devasa yaratıklardan elde ettiğimiz kabuk ve kemiklerden oyuyoruz. Kovanlarla iş daha zor ama bazen odunu bilemek mümkün oluyor, tabii o da doğru tutkulu çalışma ilahisini doğru okumayı becerirsek. Yanlış yapılırsa mermiler ateş almayabilir, hatta namlunun içinde patlayabilir."
languages.original_text: "There are these explosive flowers around here. Their pollen works as a substitute for... How do you call it... fyceline! You've got to recite a litany of fury over it and then mix it with other stuff. We carve bullets out of bark and bones, either from our own dead or some huge creatures. It's trickier with shell casings, but sometimes it's possible to sharpen wood — it depends on whether you recited the litany of fervent labour correctly or not. If you get it wrong, then the bullets tend to misfire, or even explode in the barrel."

Yanlış yapılırsa mermiler ateş almayabilir, hatta namlunun içinde patlayabilir."

languages.text: “这附近有种爆炸花，它们的花粉可以替代那什么来着，哦对，火药。对着它念一通盛怒祷文，再和别的东西掺合起来。我们用树皮和骨头刻子弹，材料就是我们自己人的尸骨，或是那些巨兽的骨头。弹壳就比较棘手了，不过有时候拿木头也能削得出来，关键看你有没有念对勤奋劳作祷文。要是念错了，那子弹不是哑火，就是直接在枪膛里炸开。”
languages.original_text: "There are these explosive flowers around here. Their pollen works as a substitute for... How do you call it... fyceline! You've got to recite a litany of fury over it and then mix it with other stuff. We carve bullets out of bark and bones, either from our own dead or some huge creatures. It's trickier with shell casings, but sometimes it's possible to sharpen wood — it depends on whether you recited the litany of fervent labour correctly or not. If you get it wrong, then the bullets tend to misfire, or even explode in the barrel."

languages.text: "Es gibt hier diese explosiven Blumen. Ihre Pollen dienen uns als Substitut für ... Wie nennt Ihr es ... Fycelin! Man muss eine Litanei der Wut auf sie sprechen und sie dann mit etwas anderem vermischen. Wir stellen Kugeln aus Rinde und Knochen her ... von unseren eigenen Toten oder großen Kreaturen. Die Hülsen sind schwieriger, aber manchmal ist es möglich, Holz zu schärfen ... wenn man die Litanei der eifrigen Arbeit korrekt gesprochen hat. Andernfalls sind die Kugeln Rohrkrepierer oder explodieren im Lauf."
languages.original_text: "There are these explosive flowers around here. Their pollen works as a substitute for... How do you call it... fyceline! You've got to recite a litany of fury over it and then mix it with other stuff. We carve bullets out of bark and bones, either from our own dead or some huge creatures. It's trickier with shell casings, but sometimes it's possible to sharpen wood — it depends on whether you recited the litany of fervent labour correctly or not. If you get it wrong, then the bullets tend to misfire, or even explode in the barrel."

Man muss eine Litanei der Wut auf sie sprechen und sie dann mit etwas anderem vermischen. Wir stellen Kugeln aus Rinde und Knochen her ... von unseren eigenen Toten oder großen Kreaturen. Die Hülsen sind schwieriger, aber manchmal ist es möglich, Holz zu schärfen ... wenn man die Litanei der eifrigen Arbeit korrekt gesprochen hat. Andernfalls sind die Kugeln Rohrkrepierer oder explodieren im Lauf."

languages.text: « Il existe des fleurs explosives dont le pollen peut faire office de... Comment on appelle ça, déjà... Ah oui, de fyceline ! Il faut juste lui réciter une litanie de fureur avant de le mélanger à d'autres substances. Nous taillons des balles dans l'écorce et les os que nous prélevons sur nos morts ou sur des créatures de grande taille. Le plus compliqué reste la confection de douilles, mais nous parvenons parfois à les fabriquer en bois, à condition de réciter correctement la litanie du fervent labeur. Sinon, les balles finissent défectueuses, ou pire, explosent dans le canon. »
languages.original_text: "There are these explosive flowers around here. Their pollen works as a substitute for... How do you call it... fyceline! You've got to recite a litany of fury over it and then mix it with other stuff. We carve bullets out of bark and bones, either from our own dead or some huge creatures. It's trickier with shell casings, but sometimes it's possible to sharpen wood — it depends on whether you recited the litany of fervent labour correctly or not. If you get it wrong, then the bullets tend to misfire, or even explode in the barrel."

Il faut juste lui réciter une litanie de fureur avant de le mélanger à d'autres substances. Nous taillons des balles dans l'écorce et les os que nous prélevons sur nos morts ou sur des créatures de grande taille. Le plus compliqué reste la confection de douilles, mais nous parvenons parfois à les fabriquer en bois, à condition de réciter correctement la litanie du fervent labeur. Sinon, les balles finissent défectueuses, ou pire, explosent dans le canon. »

languages.text: «Por aquí hay unas flores explosivas. Su polen sirve como sustituto de... ¿cómo era...? ¡De la fycelina! Hay que recitar una letanía de furia sobre él y mezclarlo con algunas cosas más. Tallamos balas con corteza y hueso, ya sea de nuestros caídos o de criaturas grandes. Los casquillos son más complicados, pero a veces es posible afilar madera para ello; depende de si se recita bien la letanía del trabajo ferviente. Si lo haces mal, las balas tienden a no dispararse o incluso a explotar en el cañón».
languages.original_text: "There are these explosive flowers around here. Their pollen works as a substitute for... How do you call it... fyceline! If you get it wrong, then the bullets tend to misfire, or even explode in the barrel."
